question: Rank the top ten properties by total NOI over the last 12 months, showing the rank.
gold_sql: WITH cte AS (SELECT p.name AS name, SUM(f.net_operating_income) AS noi FROM property_financials f JOIN properties p ON p.property_id = f.property_id WHERE f.period_end >= '2025-07-01' GROUP BY p.name) SELECT name, noi, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY noi DESC) AS rnk FROM cte ORDER BY rnk LIMIT 10
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
.id, 
       pr.name AS property_name,
       pr.address,
       pr.city,
       pr.state,
       pr.property_type,
       pr.market,
       pr.submarket,
       pr.rentable_sqft,
       pr.year_built,
       pr.year_renovated,
       pr.num_floors,
       pr.acquisition_date,
       pr.acquisition_price,
       pr.current_market_value,
       pr.ownership_pct,
       pr.status,
       pr.disposition_date,
       pr.cap_rate,
       pr.appraiser,
       pr.occupancy_rate,
       pr.committed_capital,
       pr.target_irr,
       pr.inception_date,
       pr.status,
       pr.disposition_date,
       pr.cap_rate,
       pr.appraiser,
       pr.occupancy_rate,
       pr.total_noi_over_last_12_months AS total_noi_over_last_12_months,
       pr.rank
FROM (
    SELECT 
       p.property_id,
       p.name AS property_name,
       p.address,
       p.city,
       p.state,
       p.property_type,
       p.market,
       p.submarket,
       p.rentable_sqft,
       p.year_built,
       p.year_renovated,
       p.num_floors,
       p.acquisition_date,
       p.acquisition_price,
       p.current_market_value,
       p.ownership_pct,
       p.status,
       p.disposition_date,
       p.cap_rate,
       p.appraiser,
       p.occupancy_rate,
       SUM(pf.net_operating_income) AS total_noi_over_last_12_months,
       ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(pf.net_operating_income) DESC) AS rank
    FROM properties p
    JOIN property_financials pf ON p.property_id = pf.property_id
    WHERE pf.period_end >= DATE('now', '-1 year')
    GROUP BY p.property_id
) pr
WHERE pr.rank <= 10
ORDER BY pr.total_noi_over_last_12_months DESC

    FROM property_financials
